title: Blackmoor Grey Chopping Board Set of 4 / Versatile and Durable Chopping Boards for Kitchen/Cutting Meat, Fish, Vegetables, Hot Foods and More/Dishwasher Safe
features: INDEX STYLE CHOPPING BOARDS – These 4 chopping boards have individual displays that will highlight which board is to be used for preparing vegetables, meats, fish & pre-cooked foods, therefore reducing the risk of cross contamination at meal-prep time.

NON-POROUS WORKTOP SAVERS – The 4 individual worktop saver boards are non-porous, meaning that bacteria and germs can’t penetrate the surface and damage the product, as well as not spreading germs to the foods you’re preparing too.

STYLISH GREY MARBLE EFFECT – This stylish chopping board set utilises a grey marble effect finish, making them suitable for both modern and traditional kitchen settings. Each board is non-slip, and come complete with a stand to keep them organised and compact on your kitchen worktop surfaces.

DISHWASHER SAFE – Each chopping board is dishwasher safe, making the clean-up process post meal prep nice and easy. Each board measures 27cm x 18cm, meaning they won’t be taking up too much space on the worktops when in use, or in dishwashers when being cleaned.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: From the manufacturer Modern & Stylish Chopping Board Set 4 Index Style Chopping Boards To Prepare Vegetables, Meats, Fish & Pre-Cooked Foods This modern and stylish chopping board set features 4 individual boards that allow you to slice, dice, chop and prepare a wide variety of meats, vegetables, fish, and pre-cooked foods. Each of the boards are non-porous, which enables them to withstand multiple uses without any bacteria or germs penetrating the boards, thus making them the chopping boards of choice to last a long time in your kitchen. The chopping board set comes with a handy storage tower that keeps all of the boards in one compact space, ensuring that your kitchen worktops stay neat and tidy. 4 INDEX STYLE CHOPPING BOARDS TO PREPARE: Meats Vegetables Fish Cooked Meats NON-POROUS Each of the boards have been manufactured to be non-porous, meaning no germs or bacteria will penetrate the boards, ensuring their longevity in the kitchen. INDEX STYLE PRESENTATION The 4 index style chopping boards let you know straight away which boards to use to prepare meats, fish, vegetables, and cooked foods. MODERN & STYLISH This chopping board set comes in a modern and stylish grey marble colour, and will compliment any modern or traditional styled kitchen. 5-Piece Knife Set 24cm Frying Pan Bamboo Chopping Board 20cm Saucepan 6-Piece Utensil Set Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 4,371 4.5 out of 5 stars 17,351 4.0 out of 5 stars 3 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,471 4.2 out of 5 stars 729 Price £16.37 £ 16 . 37 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 — no data £15.59 £ 15 . 59 — no data OTHER BLACKMOOR ESSENTIALS: ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
